title: Events managers and organisers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate entertainment and recreational activities and operations of a recreational facility, including cruise ships and parks. All personal service managers not listed separately. Manage or coordinate fitness and wellness programs and services. Manage and train staff of wellness specialists, health educators, or fitness instructors. (Based on 19 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Negotiate contracts with service providers and suppliers such as hotels, convention centers, and speakers.
Meet with sponsors and organizing committees to plan events, establish budgets, and review procedures and progress.
Plan and develop event programs, agendas, budgets, and services according to customer requirements.
Coordinate services for events, including accommodation, transportation, catering, signage, and security.
Inspect event facilities to ensure they meet customer requirements, and conduct evaluations to improve future events.
Maintain records of event details, including financial aspects, and review event bills for accuracy before approval.
Develop event topics, select featured speakers, and organize registration for event participants.
Consult with customers to determine their objectives and requirements for events such as meetings and conventions.
Hire, train, and supervise volunteers and support staff for events, while ensuring compliance with regulations and participant satisfaction.
Promote events by publicizing them, engaging with professional associations, and seeking sponsorship opportunities.
Monitor emerging trends regarding industry regulations to determine potential impacts on organizational processes.

Review regulatory agency submission materials and marketing literature to ensure compliance with regulatory standards.

Train staff in regulatory policies and procedures, discussing compliance issues to ensure informed practices.

Recruit, interview, and hire employees while assessing their performance and verifying credentials.
Develop fitness or wellness programs, organize events like organized runs, and teach fitness classes to improve participant health.
Manage or oversee fitness or recreation facilities ensuring safety and cleanliness of equipment and environment.
Respond to customer inquiries or complaints and explain facility rules and regulations to enhance client satisfaction.
Monitor compliance systems to ensure effectiveness and maintain documentation of compliance activities and events.
Develop marketing strategies for wellness programs and conduct needs assessments to gauge satisfaction with services.
Track attendance and performance data related to wellness events and offer individual support in wellness or nutrition.
Develop relationships and communicate with customers, site managers, developers, landowners, authorities, utility representatives, or residents.
Evaluate fitness and wellness programs to determine their effectiveness.
Train or coordinate the training of employees in operations, safety, environmental issues, or technical issues.
Supervise the work of subcontractors or consultants to ensure quality and conformance to specifications or budgets.
Monitor and maintain records of daily facility operations.
Coordinate on-site activities for environmental cleanup or remediation projects to ensure compliance with laws, standards, or requirements.
Prepare and submit budget estimates, progress reports, or cost tracking reports.
Plan, schedule, or coordinate project activities to meet deadlines.
Negotiate contracts for services or materials related to environmental remediation.
Submit project deliverables to clients, ensuring adherence to quality standards.
